message:
chore(audit): record batches 416-418 (async patterns, FrankenSuite, cast audit, session)

Batch 416: Async-specific pattern audit (waker management, Pin safety,
cancel-safety, stale waker detection) across channel/sync/stream — all SOUND.

Batch 417: FrankenSuite workspace crates (kernel, evidence, decision,
frankenlab, conformance — 7 files, ~6.8K lines, all SOUND). High-cast-count
files (raptorq/decoder, systematic, intrusive_wheel, plan/certificate —
all bounded by RFC 6330 table limits). Core modules (epoch, app, macaroon —
all SOUND).

Batch 418: Messaging session module (contract, obligation, projection — all
SOUND). explain.rs (composition fixed-point correct), class.rs (policy
validation correct).

Session grand total: 31 bugs fixed, 130+ files audited, ~170K+ lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
